content.en:
"I had a lot of luck and found more than thirty pieces of Blood Vine Snake Lin Stone!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

No wonder so many realm gods want to enter the realm rift, every time a new realm crack is born, it is a chance, but fighting with the demon seed is also a very dangerous thing, and there will definitely be many realm gods falling.

The fall of a realm god is very likely to represent the decline of a force, and some medium-sized forces will even be directly destroyed because of this.

If you are unlucky, even the powerful Momen will fall.

......

As the news spread, even forces farther away sent the Realm God into this Boundary Rift, and the same was true on the side of the Demon Seed Abyss, where more and more Demon Seeds poured in.

As a result, the killings here have become frequent.

Ye Tian also often encounters demon seeds, and kills with these demon seeds. "One-Three-Three"

this day.

Ye Tian encountered an incomparably powerful demon seed, the other party was equivalent to a middle-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm who had condensed the five Eternal Realm spirits, Ye Tian also belonged to this level, but he was not as good as the other party, the other party had reached the limit of this level, I am afraid that it was even stronger than the Blood Yu Realm God.

Ye Tian fought with him, and was finally hit hard by it.

However, Ye Tian also caused some injuries to the other party after working hard.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came out of this boundary and brought the resources back to the Terran Holy Kingdom.

Then, Ye Tian let his other copy body enter the boundary crack, and continued to fight against these demon seeds, and looked for resources by the way.

In this way, the years passed, and from time to time news of the fall of the Eternal Realm God Realm came.

For a while, many realm gods were frightened, and they didn't even dare to go to the realm crack.

But not long after, Momen issued an order to forcibly let some medium-sized forces send the realm gods in, otherwise if they didn't go, then who would be able to resist the demon seed?

As a result, many medium-sized forces also had no choice but to send the Realm God over.

Of course.

If the realm god is severely injured, he can go out to heal, this is allowed.

"In the near future, I'm afraid that some middle forces will completely decline!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, maybe there are also medium-level forces that will give birth to an Eternal Realm Divine Realm mid-level powerhouse, and then cultivate some Eternal Realm Divine Realm beginner-level powerhouses, and they can rank among the powerful forces.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

Ye Tian collected a lot of resources in the gap of the realm, and also killed some demon seeds, and also collected a lot of treasure resources from these demon seeds.

In addition, he had killed the demon seed that was comparable to condensing the five eternal realm spirits several times, and he also injured him again and again, making the demon seed stunned.

After all, Ye Tian tried his best every time, burning the Eternal Dao Seed and even the Eternal Realm Spirit, but it didn't take long to recover, but his injuries couldn't recover.

So, this demon seed is very puzzled.

Now, the other party is already seriously injured, and he can't beat Ye Tian anymore, once he fights with Ye Tian, he will be the first to escape.

......

As the resources of the Boundary Rift become scarce, the number of demon seeds decreases, and the number of Realm Gods also decreases.

After all, in the absence of resource benefits, there is no need for the gods and demons to kill, there is no benefit.

In the future, this boundary rift will become a battlefield for a small number of Eternal Realm God Realm and Demon Seeds, and the two sides will occasionally clash with each other, but not very often.

Unless the demon seeds are ordered by the higher levels to forcibly invade the realm of the gods, they will send a large number of demon seeds to invade.

this day.

The forces led by Momen have built a fortress at the entrance of the boundary rift, built a large number of formations, and sent a group of boundary gods to guard here, which will continue to rotate.

This is also an order from the Realm Court!

And from this point on, there will be fewer battles in the Boundary Rift, but if anyone wants to enter the Boundary Crack and kill, it is freedom.

Of course, in a short period of time, those realm gods didn't want to go in anymore, and they were all starting to heal.

Old Mountains.

The gods of the Old Sun Realm have returned, and their faces are gloomy.

He also went to the new rift, wanting to seek an opportunity, and wanted to impact the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

However, he continued to fail to get a chance, and the old mountain also fell five realm gods, and even he himself was seriously injured.

The physical injuries are just that, and it will take a few more years to recover, but the injuries of the Eternal Dao Seed are very troublesome.

The will of the god of the old day realm is observing his own eternal Dao species, and his huge eternal Dao seed has already penetrated a small hole, this small hole seems to be fine, and it can be made up for little by little with a long time and many resources........

However, the weapon that injured him was not ordinary, and a trace of special black aura in the Eternal Dao Seed was corroding his Eternal Dao Seed, making the problem of the Demon Seed of the Eternal Dao Seed becoming more and more serious.

He tried to wear out that bit of power, but he couldn't.

"Trouble, if I can't deal with the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed, I will inevitably be transformed into a demon seed, unless I take out the Eternal Dao Seed and destroy it now!"

If the Eternal Dao Seed can be destroyed, he will no longer be in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and can only be reduced to the most ordinary Eternal Dao Realm.

He's not reconciled!

He thought about it, and he could only go to the god of the Blood Yu Realm.

......

Momen.

The gods of the old world came here to ask to meet the gods of the blood realm.

In the first battle of the boundary gap, the Blood Yu Realm God was also injured, but the injury was not serious.

The god of the old world came here, and he waited for a long time before he saw an incarnation of the god of the blood realm.

"I've seen the God of the Blood Yu Realm!"

The god of the old world said respectfully.

"Old Sun Realm God, what are you doing with me, my injuries are not light, and I still need healing!" said the Blood Yu Realm God indifferently.

"Blood Yu Realm God, I ask you to help me heal the Eternal Dao Seed Injury, I am willing to pay any price!" the Old Sun Realm God hurriedly said.

"Eternal Dao Kind Injury?" "The Blood Yu Realm God frowned slightly, "What injury?"

The god of the old day realm revealed his eternal Dao species, and that trace of black aura 5.4 diffused out.

"I can't heal your Eternal Dao Seed injuries!" the Blood Yu Realm God shook his head.

"Is there no way to do it?"

The god of the old world said in despair.

"It's not just my Momen who can't help it, even the top power Galaxy Tower can't do it!" "The Blood Yu Realm Divine Dao said: "Your Eternal Dao Seed was injured by a kind of Eternal Devouring Demon Blade, which is not very powerful, but it contains a substance called Xuanwu Demon Crystal, which will make the Eternal Dao Seed continue to demonize, and there is almost no way to erase it, unless you refine it yourself, or destroy the Eternal Dao Seed." There is also a realm god in my Momen who was injured by this weapon and sent it to the Star River Tower, but the Star River Tower has no choice. Of course, there must be strong people in the realm of the gods who can erase this substance, but that kind of existence, please don't move. "。
